records.question: Which customers named Tillman Ernser who pay by Cheque became customers on or before 2018-02-28 11:37:44 and have a Residential address that is exactly on 1979-07-16 18:22:39 and started no later than 2010-12-26 08:52:50?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN customer_addresses ON customers.customer_id = customer_addresses.customer_id
WHERE customer_addresses.date_address_to = '1979-07-16 18:22:39' AND customer_addresses.date_address_from <= '2010-12-26 08:52:50' AND customers.customer_name = 'Tillman Ernser' AND customers.payment_method = 'Cheque' AND customer_addresses.address_type = 'Residential' AND customers.date_became_customer <= '2018-02-28 11:37:44'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id
FROM customers
WHERE customer_name = 'Tillman Ernser'
  AND payment_method = 'Cheque'
  AND date_became_customer <= '2018-02-28 11:37:44'
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM customer_addresses
    WHERE customer_addresses.customer_id = customers.customer_id
      AND date_address_to = '1979-07-16 18:22:39'
      AND date_address_from <= '2010-12-26 08:52:50'
      AND address_type = 'Residential'
  )

records.question: Which customers have an address with the zip postcode 623 located in NewMexico?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN customer_addresses ON customers.customer_id = customer_addresses.customer_id
JOIN addresses ON customer_addresses.address_id = addresses.address_id
WHERE addresses.zip_postcode = '623' AND addresses.state_province_county = 'NewMexico'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT DISTINCT customers.customer_id
FROM customers
JOIN customer_addresses ON customers.customer_id = customer_addresses.customer_id
JOIN addresses ON customer_addresses.address_id = addresses.address_id
WHERE addresses.zip_postcode = '623'
  AND addresses.state_province_county = 'NewMexico'

records.question: Which customers named exactly Prof. Ibrahim Bashirian use Cash as their payment method and had orders cancelled on or before 2018-03-21 11:20:46?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN customer_orders ON customers.customer_id = customer_orders.customer_id
WHERE customer_orders.order_date <= '2018-03-21 11:20:46' AND customers.payment_method = 'Cash' AND customers.customer_name = 'Prof. Ibrahim Bashirian' AND customer_orders.order_status = 'Cancelled'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id
FROM customers
WHERE customers.payment_method = 'Cash'
  AND customers.customer_name = 'Prof. Ibrahim Bashirian'
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM customer_orders
    WHERE customer_orders.customer_id = customers.customer_id
      AND customer_orders.order_status = 'Cancelled'
      AND customer_orders.order_date <= '2018-03-21 11:20:46'
  )

records.question: Which customers became customers on or before 2018-03-08 01:17:31, have a residential address that ended exactly on 2010-05-08 10:00:17, and have a contact number 542.983.0224 active at most until 2018-03-15 02:34:01?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN customer_addresses ON customers.customer_id = customer_addresses.customer_id
JOIN customer_contact_channels ON customers.customer_id = customer_contact_channels.customer_id
WHERE customer_addresses.date_address_to = '2010-05-08 10:00:17' AND customer_addresses.address_type = 'Residential' AND customer_contact_channels.active_to_date <= '2018-03-15 02:34:01' AND customer_contact_channels.contact_number = '542.983.0224' AND customers.date_became_customer <= '2018-03-08 01:17:31'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id
FROM customers
WHERE customers.date_became_customer <= '2018-03-08 01:17:31'
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM customer_addresses
    WHERE customer_addresses.customer_id = customers.customer_id
      AND customer_addresses.date_address_to = '2010-05-08 10:00:17'
      AND customer_addresses.address_type = 'Residential'
)
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM customer_contact_channels
    WHERE customer_contact_channels.customer_id = customers.customer_id
      AND customer_contact_channels.active_to_date <= '2018-03-15 02:34:01'
      AND customer_contact_channels.contact_number = '542.983.0224'
)

records.question: Which customers use Cheque as their payment method and have Handheld as a contact channel?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN customer_contact_channels ON customers.customer_id = customer_contact_channels.customer_id
WHERE customer_contact_channels.channel_code = 'Handheld' AND customers.payment_method = 'Cheque'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id
FROM customers
WHERE customers.payment_method = 'Cheque'
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM customer_contact_channels
    WHERE customer_contact_channels.customer_id = customers.customer_id
      AND customer_contact_channels.channel_code = 'Handheld'
)

records.question: Who are the customers named Prof. Ibrahim Bashirian who pay with Cash, became customers on or before 2018-03-15 02:54:27, have a Billing address, and use a Handheld contact channel with number 1-687-190-8968x63811 active on or before 2018-03-04 13:35:57?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN customer_addresses ON customers.customer_id = customer_addresses.customer_id
JOIN customer_contact_channels ON customers.customer_id = customer_contact_channels.customer_id
WHERE customers.payment_method = 'Cash' AND customer_contact_channels.channel_code = 'Handheld' AND customer_contact_channels.contact_number = '1-687-190-8968x63811' AND customers.date_became_customer <= '2018-03-15 02:54:27' AND customer_contact_channels.active_to_date <= '2018-03-04 13:35:57' AND customer_addresses.address_type = 'Billing' AND customers.customer_name = 'Prof. Ibrahim Bashirian'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id
FROM customers
WHERE customers.payment_method = 'Cash'
  AND customers.date_became_customer <= '2018-03-15 02:54:27'
  AND customers.customer_name = 'Prof. Ibrahim Bashirian'
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM customer_addresses
    WHERE customer_addresses.customer_id = customers.customer_id
      AND customer_addresses.address_type = 'Billing'
  )
  AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM customer_contact_channels
    WHERE customer_contact_channels.customer_id = customers.customer_id
      AND customer_contact_channels.channel_code = 'Handheld'
      AND customer_contact_channels.contact_number = '1-687-190-8968x63811'
      AND (customer_contact_channels.active_to_date IS NOT NULL AND customer_contact_channels.active_to_date <= '2018-03-04 13:35:57')
  )

records.question: Which customers became customers exactly on 2018-03-08 01:17:31 and have addresses in Texas, USA at 41632 Kerluke Field, East Pascale where their address period started on or after 2003-07-08 05:33:19 and ended on or before 2010-05-08 10:00:17?
records.gold_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id FROM customers
JOIN customer_addresses ON customers.customer_id = customer_addresses.customer_id
JOIN addresses ON customer_addresses.address_id = addresses.address_id
WHERE customer_addresses.date_address_from >= '2003-07-08 05:33:19' AND addresses.address_content = '41632 Kerluke Field' AND addresses.city = 'East Pascale' AND customers.date_became_customer = '2018-03-08 01:17:31' AND customer_addresses.date_address_to <= '2010-05-08 10:00:17' AND addresses.state_province_county = 'Texas' AND addresses.country = 'USA'
records.pred_sql:
SELECT customers.customer_id
FROM customers
WHERE customers.date_became_customer = '2018-03-08 01:17:31'
AND EXISTS (
    SELECT 1
    FROM customer_addresses
    JOIN addresses ON customer_addresses.address_id = addresses.address_id
    WHERE customer_addresses.customer_id = customers.customer_id
      AND customer_addresses.date_address_from >= '2003-07-08 05:33:19'
      AND customer_addresses.date_address_to <= '2010-05-08 10:00:17'
      AND addresses.address_content = '41632 Kerluke Field'
      AND addresses.city = 'East Pascale'
      AND addresses.state_province_county = 'Texas'
      AND addresses.country = 'USA'
)
